body_txt: In some religions and moral codes, sex is regarded as fraught and dangerous. Moral Guardians and their comrades have often considered sex to be just as disgusting as (if not maybe more so than) gratuitous violence . Arguments to the contrary of this view, such as sexuality being much less harmful to the human psyche than violent acts or how sex is pretty much the reason humanity and most life forms went this far without going extinct, always seeming to evade them. The Hays Code , in particular, outlawed anything that even remotely implied sex, whereas hangings and executions could be shown "within good taste". It should be noted, however, that sex and violence absolutely can go together. So, of course, adding sex automatically makes works Darker and Edgier . Want to add menace to your villain? Have him make sinister advances towards the heroine or the hero . Want to hammer into people's heads that this villain is irredeemable? Have him rape someone . Want The Ingenue to make a Face–Heel Turn ? Get her seduced by the villain . Bonus points if the villain is Ambiguously Gay . In older works, Sex Is Evil could also be used as a free pass for the hero to be a total jerk under the banner of Sex Is Evil, and I Am Horny . For example, he could sexually abuse women ( including way too young ones ), and then show his goodness by forgiving them for tempting him. Sex can be a dangerous thing ( STD s, unwanted pregnancies, abusive sexual relationships , sleeping with someone you should not be sleeping with) and the importance of safe sex is emphasized in many places for this reason. Of course, Moral Guardians being Moral Guardians means that they have a tendency to take this concept too far to the point of irrationality and portray sex as the most nauseating Eldritch Abomination in all of existence, with only exterminatus as the solution. A Sub-Trope of Fan Disservice . Compare Sexual Deviance Is Evil , and Psychosexual Horror . Contrast with Sex Is Good and Sexual Karma .
